mapper.select: select count(idx) from t_lecture_board where board_type = #{boardType} and edu_seq =#{eduSeq} and status ='1'
select count(idx) from t_lecture_board where board_type ='eduCommunity' and edu_seq =#{eduSeq} and status ='1' order by idx desc;
/**게시글 상세조회 삭제대상*/ SELECT * FROM t_lecture_board WHERE idx = #{idx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_lecture_board (board_type,edu_seq, title, content ,reg_id ,reg_nm,reg_dtime,scrty_yn) VALUES ( #{boardType}, #{eduSeq}, #{title}, #{content}, #{regId}, #{regNm} ,#{regDtime},#{scrtyYn})
